name: Hakata Mentai! Pirikarako-chan
original_name: 博多明太！ぴりからこちゃん
overview: Hakata Mentai! Pirikarako-chan is set in a mysterious shopping center in a town that is like but also not quite like Hakata. In this setting, a walleye pollack roe fairy named Pirikarako-chan rushes about every day trying to ease the worries and solve the rumors of the other food fairies.

trailers.title: 【よこく!!】博多明太！ぴりからこちゃん 7月より放映開始！
